_key.description: Unique identifier for the genomic element to biosample edge

bed_score.description: The bed score of the genomic element to biosample edge

strand.description: The strand of the genomic element to biosample edge

log2FC.description: Log2FC of the genomic element to biosample edge

DNA_count.description: The DNA count of the genomic element to biosample edge

RNA_count.description: The RNA count of the genomic element to biosample edge

minusLog10PValue.description: The minus log10 P value (null when not available).

minusLog10QValue.description: The minus log10 Q value (null when not available).

significant.description: True if this edge met the significance threshold (e.g. minusLog10QValue >= 1).

files_filesets.description: The filesets of the genomic element to biosample edge

biological_context.description: The biological context of the genomic element to biosample edge
biological_context.example: glutamatergic neuron differentiated cell specimen, pooled cell specimen from IGVFDO6638HIAD

biosample_term.description: The biosample term of the genomic element to biosample edge

treatments_term_ids.description: The treatments term ids of the genomic element to biosample edge

accessible_via.return: _id, strand, log2FC, bed_score, DNA_count, RNA_count, source, source_url
